title: Audit and fix 4 distinct anti-patterns
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/projects_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.ProjectsLive) that fixes FOUR anti-patterns simultaneously: (1) DB query in mount → move to handle_params, (2) unguarded PubSub subscribe → add connected?/1, (3) large collection via assign → convert to stream, (4) unscoped PubSub topic → scope to "projects:org:#{org_id}". mount takes %{"org_id" => org_id} from session. All four fixes are required.
tier_rationale: Four distinct Iron Laws applied together. Hard because it requires not missing any.
